summary: Synthetic ~20-file Rust wire-protocol crate (relaykit). Two conformance tests fail with numeric-only symptoms (op codes + reply kinds). Op codes are assigned AT BUILD TIME from ops/registry.list line order and exist nowhere in the source tree — grepping every symptom token cannot reach the fix file. Decoys: framing TAG_* constants, a retired string-route table. The grep-resistant moat task (probe-verified).
